DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-MS8-L4-6501000-MSVPA-HMX-IMR-02 • MS8 MSVPA • Performance Decorum and Audience Etiquette

The Letter from 1978

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: Why does Maya show Daniel the letter?
2QUESTION 2: What does Halina's letter tell players to do?
3QUESTION 3: Why does Daniel say their class needs to be told before Saturday?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Justify three answers: who the writer of the letter is, one thing the writer tells players to do, and why the boy says the class needs to be told. Use one detail from the conversation for each one.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  MU:Pr6.1.E.8 (Pr6b)  |  MS Music Grade 8: Performance Decorum and Audience Etiquette
